hvac-filter-change.name: HVAC filter change
hvac-filter-change.consequencesOfSkipping: Reduced airflow, higher utility bills, dust complaints from guests, premature HVAC failure.

ac-tune-up.name: AC tune-up (pro)
ac-tune-up.consequencesOfSkipping: Mid-summer breakdown during peak booking window. Loss of one weekend ~ $800–2000 revenue.

furnace-tune-up.name: Furnace tune-up (pro)
furnace-tune-up.consequencesOfSkipping: Cold-snap breakdown, no-heat one-star reviews, CO risk on aging gas units.

mini-split-clean.name: Mini-split filter + coil clean
mini-split-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Musty smell complaints, mildew on the blower wheel, drip-pan overflow staining the wall.

duct-vent-clean.name: Duct + supply vent vacuum
duct-vent-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Dust blow-back on every cycle; 'dusty room' is a top-five cleanliness complaint on Airbnb.

smoke-detector-test.name: Smoke + CO detector test
smoke-detector-test.consequencesOfSkipping: Liability exposure, code violation, worst-case life safety.

smoke-detector-battery.name: Smoke + CO detector battery swap
smoke-detector-battery.consequencesOfSkipping: 3 a.m. low-battery chirps wake guests — instant one-star sleep-quality review. Safety risk if battery fails between guests.

fire-extinguisher-check.name: Fire extinguisher inspection
fire-extinguisher-check.consequencesOfSkipping: Code violation. Liability if expired during incident.

gfci-test.name: GFCI outlet test (kitchen + bath)
gfci-test.consequencesOfSkipping: GFCI outlets degrade silently — 1-in-5 fail the trip test after 5 years. Failed GFCI in a wet area is a shock-hazard liability.

radon-test.name: Radon level test
radon-test.consequencesOfSkipping: Long-term tenant + guest health exposure; some markets require disclosure on every booking.

deep-clean.name: Deep clean (between long stays)
deep-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Cleanliness reviews drop. Below 4.7 average and you lose Superhost.

carpet-deep-clean.name: Carpet steam clean (whole house)
carpet-deep-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Visible traffic lanes, lingering pet/odor complaints, premature carpet replacement (cuts lifespan from 7 yr to ~4 yr).

tile-grout-reseal.name: Tile grout re-seal (showers + floors)
tile-grout-reseal.consequencesOfSkipping: Mildew creeps into porous grout — guests photograph it and Airbnb refunds for cleanliness.

gutter-clean.name: Gutter cleaning
gutter-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Ice dams in cold climates, foundation water damage, soffit rot.

chimney-sweep.name: Chimney sweep
chimney-sweep.consequencesOfSkipping: Creosote fire risk. Insurance won't cover damage if maintenance log is empty.

dryer-vent-clean.name: Dryer vent cleaning
dryer-vent-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Major fire hazard (~3000 home fires/year per FEMA). Dryer takes 2–3 cycles to dry one load.

fridge-coil-clean.name: Refrigerator coil vacuum
fridge-coil-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Compressor works harder, electricity bill creeps up, fridge dies 3 years early.

dishwasher-clean.name: Dishwasher filter + seal clean
dishwasher-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Cloudy glassware, stink complaints from guests, premature pump-motor failure.

garbage-disposal-flush.name: Garbage disposal flush + sharpen
garbage-disposal-flush.consequencesOfSkipping: Smell. Guests notice on day one of a stay. Replacing a corroded disposal is ~$200 + plumber visit.

oven-self-clean.name: Oven self-clean cycle
oven-self-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Burnt-food smell on first guest cook. Carbon buildup on the heating element shortens its life.

range-hood-filter.name: Range hood filter degrease
range-hood-filter.consequencesOfSkipping: Greasy filter pulls less air, leaves cooking smells in the unit between turnovers.

water-heater-flush.name: Water heater flush
water-heater-flush.consequencesOfSkipping: Sediment buildup → reduced capacity → shorter showers → guest complaints.

supply-line-check.name: Washing-machine + dishwasher supply line inspection
supply-line-check.consequencesOfSkipping: Burst supply line is the #1 cause of catastrophic STR water damage — five-figure claim, weeks offline.

sump-pump-test.name: Sump pump test
sump-pump-test.consequencesOfSkipping: Pump dies between heavy rains and you don't know until the basement floods. Two minutes of testing prevents a $10k cleanup.

outdoor-faucet-winterize.name: Outdoor faucet winterize
outdoor-faucet-winterize.consequencesOfSkipping: Frozen pipe burst inside the wall. Insurance often denies if winterization wasn't done.

pressure-wash-deck.name: Pressure-wash deck / siding
pressure-wash-deck.consequencesOfSkipping: Algae buildup, deck-board rot, curb-appeal hits in listing photos.

deck-stain-seal.name: Deck stain + seal
deck-stain-seal.consequencesOfSkipping: Bare-wood weathering ages the deck 3x faster — re-deck is $5–15k.

roof-inspection.name: Roof inspection (visual + flashing)
roof-inspection.consequencesOfSkipping: Missed shingle damage → leak above guest bedroom → emergency tarp + ceiling repair + booking refunds.

window-screen-repair.name: Window screen repair / wash
window-screen-repair.consequencesOfSkipping: Bug ingress + photographable cosmetic flaw in summer listing photos.

pest-control-quarterly.name: Pest control treatment
pest-control-quarterly.consequencesOfSkipping: One ant trail in the kitchen = guaranteed cleanliness 1-star and a full refund. Pre-emption is cheaper than recovery.

snow-blower-service.name: Snow blower / generator service
snow-blower-service.consequencesOfSkipping: Equipment doesn't start the morning of the first storm — driveway not cleared, guest can't access property.
